description: Date on Feb 29 of a leap year plus 1 year lands on Feb 28
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
builder.add_constraint(x == Date(2020, 2, 29))
builder.add_constraint(x + Period(1, 0, 0) == Date(2021, 2, 28))
result = builder

description: Adding 1 month to Jan 31 gives Feb 28/29 depending on leap year
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
y = builder.add_date_var("y")
builder.add_constraint(x == Date(2020, 1, 31))
builder.add_constraint(y == Date(2019, 1, 31))
builder.add_constraint(x + Period(0, 1, 0) == Date(2020, 2, 29))
builder.add_constraint(y + Period(0, 1, 0) == Date(2019, 2, 28))
result = builder

description: One year is not always equal to 365 days
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
builder.add_constraint(x >= Date(2020, 1, 1))
builder.add_constraint(x <= Date(2020, 2, 28))
builder.add_constraint(x + Period(1, 0, 0) != x + Period(0, 0, 365))
result = builder

description: Complex chain of period additions requires proper normalization
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
p = builder.add_date_var("p")
q = builder.add_date_var("q")
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
p = builder.add_period_var("p")
q = builder.add_period_var("q")
builder.add_constraint(x == Date(2000, 1, 1))
builder.add_constraint(p == Period(0, 13, 0))
builder.add_constraint(q == Period(0, 0, 400))
builder.add_constraint(x + p + q == Date(2001, 3, 6))
result = builder

description: Unsatisfiable constraint due to tight date bounds
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
y = builder.add_date_var("y")
builder.add_constraint(x >= Date(2022, 1, 1))
builder.add_constraint(x <= Date(2022, 1, 31))
builder.add_constraint(y >= Date(2022, 3, 1))
builder.add_constraint(y <= Date(2022, 3, 31))
builder.add_constraint(y - x <= Period(0, 1, 15))
result = builder

description: Verify leap year handling with Feb 29
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
builder.add_constraint(x >= Date(2020, 2, 28))
builder.add_constraint(x <= Date(2020, 3, 1))
builder.add_constraint(x + Period(0, 0, 1) == Date(2020, 3, 1))
result = builder

description: Adding 1 month vs 30 days produces different results at month end
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
y = builder.add_date_var("y")
z = builder.add_date_var("z")
builder.add_constraint(x == Date(2023, 1, 31))
builder.add_constraint(y == x + Period(0, 1, 0))
builder.add_constraint(z == x + Period(0, 0, 30))
builder.add_constraint(y != z)
result = builder

description: One year is not always equal to 365 days
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
y = builder.add_date_var("y")
builder.add_constraint(x >= Date(2019, 12, 31))
builder.add_constraint(x <= Date(2020, 2, 1))
builder.add_constraint(y == x + Period(1, 0, 0))
builder.add_constraint(y != x + Period(0, 0, 365))
result = builder

description: Complex period chain addition with normalization
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
p = builder.add_date_var("p")
q = builder.add_date_var("q")
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
p = builder.add_period_var("p")
q = builder.add_period_var("q")
builder.add_constraint(x == Date(2022, 1, 15))
builder.add_constraint(p == Period(0, 13, 0))
builder.add_constraint(q == Period(0, 0, 400))
builder.add_constraint(x + p + q == Date(2023, 3, 21))
result = builder

description: Tight inequality window creates unsatisfiable constraint
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
builder.add_constraint(x > Date(2023, 4, 30))
builder.add_constraint(x < Date(2023, 5, 1))
result = builder
smtlib:
; benchmark generated from python API
(set-info :status unknown)
(declare-fun x_month () Int)
(declare-fun x_year () Int)
(declare-fun x_day () Int)
(assert
 (let (($x876 (= x_month 4)))
 (let ((?x761 (ite (or $x876 (= x_month 6) (= x_month 9) (= x_month 11)) 30 31)))
 (let (($x525 (= (mod x_year 400) 0)))
 (let (($x555 (= (mod x_year 4) 0)))
 (let ((?x804 (ite (or (and $x555 (and (distinct (mod x_year 100) 0) true)) $x525) 29 28)))
 (let (($x583 (= x_month 2)))
 (let (($x502 (<= x_day (ite $x583 ?x804 ?x761))))
 (let (($x566 (>= x_day 1)))
 (let (($x630 (<= x_month 2)))
 (let (($x487 (>= x_month 1)))
 (let (($x1085 (= x_year 2100)))
 (let (($x1099 (<= x_month 12)))
 (let (($x986 (<= x_year 2099)))
 (let (($x1008 (>= x_year 1901)))
 (or (and (= x_year 1900) (>= x_month 3) $x1099 $x566 $x502) (and $x1008 $x986 $x487 $x1099 $x566 $x502) (and $x1085 $x487 $x630 $x566 $x502)))))))))))))))))
(assert
 (let (($x495 (= x_year 2023)))
 (let (($x557 (and $x495 (or (< x_month 4) (and (= x_month 4) (<= x_day 30))))))
 (not (or (< x_year 2023) $x557)))))
(assert
 (let (($x495 (= x_year 2023)))
(let (($x856 (and $x495 (or (> x_month 5) (and (= x_month 5) (>= x_day 1))))))
(not (or (> x_year 2023) $x856)))))
(check-sat)

constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
builder.add_constraint(x >= Date(2023, 1, 31))
builder.add_constraint((x + Period(0, 1, 0)) <= Date(2023, 3, 1))
result = builder

builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
builder.add_constraint(x >= Date(2023, 1, 1))
builder.add_constraint((x + Period(0, 1, 0)) > (x + Period(0, 0, 31)))
result = builder

constraints: (x + Period(0, 1, 0) + Period(0, 0, 15)) == y, 'x + 1 month + 15 days = y'
constraint_code:
builder = DateSMTBuilder()
x = builder.add_date_var("x")
y = builder.add_date_var("y")
builder.add_constraint(x >= Date(2023, 6, 1))
builder.add_constraint((x + Period(0, 1, 0) + Period(0, 0, 15)) == y)
builder.add_constraint(y >= Date(2023, 6, 1))
result = builder
